steps.title: Identify the shared publication context
steps.content: The passage specifies that The Federalist Papers were published in 1787-88 across multiple newspapers, and both No. 12 and No. 62 are essays within this collection.

steps.title: Match the context to the choices
steps.content:
Both essays are in The Federalist Papers, which were published in 1787-88, so both were published during that period.

Choices A and D contradict the passage by claiming uncertain or collaborative authorship for No. 12 (which was “surely penned by Hamilton”), and Choice C assumes both appeared in the Independent Journal without evidence.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
